FileName.description: The name of the file to be used on the client’s documents page when it is uploaded.

MediaType.description: The type of file or file extension. Possible values are: * pdf * jpg * jpeg * tif * tiff * png * doc * docx * bmp * txt * rtf * xlsx * xls * gif * zip * ppt * pptx * mov

Buffer.description: A Base64-encoded string representation of the file’s byte array.
